needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular.{v, u_3} {m : Type u_3} {R : Type v} {M : Matrix m m R} [CommRing R] [DecidableEq m] [Fintype m] [LinearOrder m] (h : M.BlockTriangular id) : M.det = ∏ i, M i i
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Main theorem for upper triangular determinant.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Matrix.det_permute.{v, u_2} {n : Type u_2} [DecidableEq n] [Fintype n] {R : Type v} [CommRing R] (σ : Equiv.Perm n) (M : Matrix n n R) : (M.submatrix (⇑σ) id).det = ↑↑(Equiv.Perm.sign σ) * M.det
Matrix.det_permute'.{v, u_2} {n : Type u_2} [DecidableEq n] [Fintype n] {R : Type v} [CommRing R] (σ : Equiv.Perm n) (M : Matrix n n R) : (M.submatrix id ⇑σ).det = ↑↑(Equiv.Perm.sign σ) * M.det
